race.comment: AMEDEI (10) resumes and was last seen in the Moonee Valley Fillies Classic won by Salty Pearl over 1600m at Moonee Valley. Didn't have the best of it in that, and her two recent jumpouts have been sharp. The promising filly is in a top barn and should have these covered. CUMULATE (12) had been well educated before his 1.3L defeat at Echuca on debut. She races forward and is sure to have taken improvement. Has each-way claims. BEST TERMS (2) resumes and was last seen at Swan Hill, where he was caught wide over a mile as a heavily-bet favourite. His jump-outs suggest he'll return sharply improved. The gate is a little awkward. DISCOVER LUPINO (3) had jumped-out well and showed enough at Cranbourne on debut to consider.
